notes: Pointer-stub corpus. To be populated verbatim by a future scripts/pull_idaho_rules.py from the Idaho Supreme Court rules pages (isc.idaho.gov). Per-rule print pattern https://isc.idaho.gov/rules-procedure/print/ircp/<n> and the https://isc.idaho.gov/ircp<n>-new pages; rule-set landings at /rules-procedure/ire, /rules-procedure/irfl, and /rules-procedure/irefs. Until the puller runs, each file is a well-formed pointer stub (header + canonical URL + scope note) directing to the canonical source. A _file_is_stub guard should preserve any committed verbatim content on a failed run.

targets.name: Idaho Rules of Family Law Procedure
Idaho Rules for Electronic Filing and Service
